hero.sub: We offer professional detailing, ceramic coatings and paint correction. Every detail handled with precision.

services.title: Services & Pricing
services.subtitle: Transparent pricing — no surprises, only results.

about.title:
Passion for
perfection
about.body:
Pro Room Detailing was born from a simple belief: every car deserves to look its absolute best. Based in Durleşti, Moldova, our team of certified technicians combines professional-grade products with meticulous hand craftsmanship to deliver results that speak for themselves.

From a single wash to a full ceramic coating, we treat every vehicle — and every client — with the same level of care and precision.

gallery.title: Our Work
gallery.subtitle: Every detail matters — see the results for yourself.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from real customers who trust us with their vehicles.

footer.brandDesc: Premium car detailing services — certified technicians, top-grade products, and flawless results, every single time.

polishing.name: Car Polishing
polishing.description: Removes scratches, swirls and paint imperfections by machine or hand polishing, restoring gloss and protecting the paintwork.

ceramic_car.name: Ceramic Coating for Car
ceramic_car.description: Advanced ceramic treatment that bonds to the paint surface, providing durable protection against scratches, stains and UV damage.

chemical.name: Chemical Cleaning
chemical.description: Deep cleaning of interior surfaces using professional-grade chemicals to remove stubborn dirt, stains and odours.

headlights.name: Headlight Restoration
headlights.description: Polishes oxidised headlight lenses to remove yellowing and haziness, significantly improving light output and appearance.

protection.name: Interior & Exterior Protection
protection.description: Protective treatments applied to both interior materials and exterior surfaces, guarding against wear, stains and environmental damage.

engine.name: Engine Detailing & Wash
engine.description: Thorough cleaning and degreasing of the engine bay to restore appearance and protect components against corrosion.

ceramic_windows.name: Ceramic Coating for Windows
ceramic_windows.description: Ceramic layer applied to glass surfaces that repels water, reduces glare and keeps windows cleaner for longer.

ceramic_rims.name: Ceramic Coating for Rims
ceramic_rims.description: Durable ceramic protection for alloy wheels, making them resistant to brake dust, road grime and minor abrasions.

wax.name: Carnauba Wax
wax.description: Natural carnauba palm wax that adds a deep, warm shine to the paintwork and provides a layer of protective gloss.

wash.name: Professional Wash
wash.description: Complete exterior and interior wash using specialist equipment and detailing products for a showroom-fresh finish.

leather.name: Leather Interior Restoration
leather.description: Repairs and restores leather upholstery by removing scratches and stains, then conditioning and protecting the hide.

ozone.name: Cabin Ozone Treatment
ozone.description: Ozone treatment that eliminates unpleasant odours, bacteria and airborne impurities from the vehicle interior.

testimonialReviews.maria: The guys are great — I went in for polishing, chemical cleaning and ceramic coating. The result was outstanding, the car looked brand new. Very friendly team, highly recommended (Mercedes C-Class).
testimonialReviews.butenko: Fast. Precise. High quality. I had my car polished and ceramic-coated, and the team threw in a free inspection and engine wash. Extremely happy with the results.
testimonialReviews.vlad: Excellent detailing — these guys are true professionals. Wide range of services and a personalised approach to every customer!
